scripts.preinstall:
node -e "for(const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'])if(require('fs').existsSync(f)){process.stderr.write('
[preinstall] ERROR: '+f+' is in the repo root.
This is a pnpm workspace; npm and yarn lockfiles are not supported.
Run:  rm '+f+' && pnpm install

');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm run lint:resupply && pnpm run typecheck && node scripts/run-resupply-checks.mjs && pnpm run test
